ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "site" TEXT /* Name of the site hosting the contest */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport for the contest (e.g., NBA) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the contest takes place */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "buy_in" REAL /* Entry fee for the contest */,
  "max_entries" INTEGER /* Maximum number of entries allowed per participant */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points awarded across entries */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Detailed rules of the contest */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the contest (e.g., head-to-head, tournament) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the contest (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the contest */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the contest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contest (e.g., upcoming, live, completed) */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the contest */,
  "prize_distribution" TEXT /* Details of prize distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest the entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the entry */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the entry within the contest */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored by the entry */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time when the entry was made */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entry fee has been paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team or lineup */,
  "team_details" TEXT /* Details of the team or lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., participant, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role entails */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest the user is participating in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the contest */,
  "entry_count" INTEGER /* Number of entries the user has made in the contest */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the user in the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_participants_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)
